name: Italian Sausage and Zucchini Stir Fry
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the Italian sausage into 1/4 inch slices.
2. Brown the sausage in a wok or large skillet until cooked through.
3. Add the chopped onions to the skillet when the sausage is nearly done and cook for about 2 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Drain any excess fat from the skillet if necessary.
5. Add the chopped tomatoes, zucchini, lemon juice, salt, Tabasco sauce, and oregano to the skillet.
6. Stir fry the vegetables and sausage mixture, uncovered, for about 5 minutes, stirring frequently until the zucchini is tender and the flavors are well combined.
7. Remove the stir fry from the heat and transfer it to a serving plate.
8. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
9. Serve hot with crusty Italian bread. Yield: 4 servings.
